programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Thanks to the industry-defining innovations of three men through the creation of games like Super Mario and Pokémon, Nintendo goes from a struggling playing card company to a video game juggernaut.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Thanks to the industry-defining innovations of three men through the creation of games like Super Mario and Pokémon, Nintendo goes from a struggling playing card company to a video game juggernaut.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most infamous crimes in American history: the gruesome murder of a young beauty, unsolved for decades. There's a long line of suspects, each more mysterious than the next.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies and Japan clash in the jungles and plains of Asia, the 'forgotten theater' of World War II, as America struggles to bring the fight to Tokyo’s door.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Harvey Firestone races to innovation against a crosstown rival as they both bet big on bringing car tyres to the nation. As sworn enemies, they’ll create two of the most famous brand names in America.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly, and unforgettable – places like Iwo Jima, Devil’s Island, and Snake Island – these isles are home to some of history’s darkest stories.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3)

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies undertake Operation Overlord, one of the most complicated and massive military invasions in history, to liberate Occupied France and open up a true second front in Western Europe.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3)
programme.desc: These stories take survival to the extreme. Like fending off a black bear while dangling off a cliff. Or drifting through shark-infested waters with nothing but a pair of rubber boots to stay afloat.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2)
programme.desc: From the strict codes of Hammurabi to the secretly malevolent evil eye, history is full of acts committed in the name of revenge. We uncover the forces that have driven individuals to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick and Corey race to San Diego to take a spin in the classic car Hell's Chariot, from the movie Grease. Is the flaming hot rod the one that they want, or will they 'drop out' of the deal?

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: Robbie and Jersey go wild for Edd's classic car collection, but he's reluctant to let anything go. Mike has a brush with country music stardom as he combs through the belongings of Hank Williams Jr.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: Come along for a feast as Chris explores the secrets behind the famous Taiwanese street banquet Bando. Venturing behind the scenes, Chris is stunned by the seamless efficiency of the all-female Bando team.

programme.title: The Taiwan Way
programme.desc: With competition at an all-time high, Chris embarks on a boba-tastic journey to meet experts and discover what it takes to stand out in the bubble tea industry. He starts by sampling classic bubble teas.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5)
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, an underestimated confectioner creates the first wrapped penny candy—the Tootsie Roll. Meanwhile, an unemployed salesman transforms medicinal hard candy into a multipack.

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: Jaime meets the Finest Female surfer in the Philippines, the Queen of Cloud 9, Nildie Rietenbach. Can she conquer the waves after a single lesson?

programme.title: Ride n' Seek With Jaime Dempsey (S5)
programme.desc: While Jaime heads for Puerto Princesa Underground River through a mangrove swamp, she is offered a local snack – a shipworm from a rotting log.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Come Drink with Me
programme.desc: The brother of the mystery swordswoman "Golden Swallow” is kidnapped. She joins forces with a beggar “Drunken Cat” who is skilled in martial arts to free her brother from a Buddhist monastery run by a corrupt abbot. The film was selected as Hong Kong’s entry for the Best Foreign Language Film at the 39th Academy Awards.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Table for Six 2
programme.desc: The sequel to "Table for Six", Bernard and Lung plan to get married while their eldest brother is away. Yet, the weddings spiral into a chaotic battleground with escalating family drama, creating a messy affair for everyone involved.

programme.title: Pass and Goal
programme.desc: After losing everything, a businesswoman starts over in Sham Shui Po, forming a kids’ football team to take on an elite squad. As she rebuilds her life, she inspires her players to believe in themselves and fight against the odds. Together, they strive to rewrite their first half with a second chance at victory and hope.

programme.title: Invincible Shaolin
programme.desc: An evil Qing general comes up with a plan to rid the Shaolin masters once and for all. He invites three Northern Shaolin experts to fight against three Southern Shaolin disciples. After the contest, the general secretly kills the Southerners and places the blame on the Northerners. This leads to in-fighting between both Shaolin schools.

programme.title: Come Back Home
programme.desc: In a chilly winter, De and his family goes on a self-drive tour to Changbai Mountain. The holiday turns tragic when De’s eight-year-old son goes missing. He seeks help from the local police but is unable to find his son. Though the golden hour has passed, De and the rescue team insist on continuing the search. Can they finally rescue the boy?

programme.title: Kung Fu Jungle
programme.desc: A vicious killer goes around challenging and killing top martial arts masters. When convicted killer and kung fu expert Ha Hou Mo hears of this, he offers to help the police capture the killer in exchange for his freedom. Can he really help?

programme.title: Band Four
programme.desc: An aspiring singer of an indie band called Band Four reunites with her estranged guitarist father following the death of her mother. Together with her half-sister and her nine-year-old son, the newly reunited family come together to support each other through their love and passion for music.

programme.title: The Flag of Iron
programme.desc: When super director Chang Cheh found new talent and blood with "The Five Venoms" actors, most of which were trained in the highly acrobatic Chinese opera and well versed with exotic martial arts weapons, this created a new spark for his use of bizarre weapons in his films. The Flag Of Iron is one of 20 movies that he directed featuring the utterly flabbergasting and physically exhausting action bits created by these five dudes. You have the good guys from the righteous clan versus the bad guys from the villainous clan and it's so filled with "don't-blink-or-you-will-miss-something" gags, you will need to watch it over and over again so you can see the things you missed.

programme.title: Endgame
programme.desc: A killer and a stage actor accidentally swapped their identities at a bathhouse. The actor must complete the killer’s mission while the killer thinks he is a hopeless actor after losing his memory during the accident. When the killer strives to become a successful stage actor, he also starts to recall what has happened…

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: Qing enforcer Luo Yi Hu murders rebel Chen Gui, forcing his wife and daughter Xiao Wei to flee to Guang Long Town. There, mischievous Jia Yu discovers his master’s identity as a rebel while helping Xiao Wei. After his loved ones and mentor are killed, Jia Yu sheds his playful ways and seeks vengeance, facing the Qing forces in a final battle.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu dies in a skiing accident and his roommate Yoshio marries his wife as well as inherits his entire fortune. At Tamotsu's funeral, Yoshio sees a badly disfigured old man and that is only the beginning of an evil downfall for him…

programme.title: The Assassin
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Nieh Cheng has retired into hiding. However, when Premier Yen's family is massacred, he seeks out the reclusive swordsman and coaxes him into a final revenge mission in this epic story set in the Six Kingdom era.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan is a wealthy Kwangtung brat with a good kung fu background, he has only one ambition: to pit his wits against three shady masters of the North. The first, conman Che Tsai. The second, a professional romantic dubbed The Terrific. Terrific introduces Tou Kuan to his third rival, Thief Shih San-shou.

programme.title: Mad Fate
programme.desc: A Master fortune teller predicts that Tung, a born psychopath, will be imprisoned for murder and tries to change his fate. A veteran detective believes Tung is a psychopathic serial killer after witnessing him kill a cat, and pursues him relentlessly. Can the Master change Tung’s mad fate?

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Amid the recession caused by the pandemic, debt-ridden wedding planner, Sheng, finds a lifeline as he transitions into a funeral planner. His unconventional approach leads to unexpected success, and his attitude toward his career and life is transformed after being inspired by the respected Master Wen.

programme.title: Golden Swallow
programme.desc: A heroine finds herself in a love triangle with a swordsman and a warrior. They team up to conquer the evil forces of the martial arts world but she is unable to choose between both men even as they face a deadly duel.

programme.title: Fist to Fist
programme.desc: While tracking a powerful drug syndicate, narcotics officer He Guang Chen is ambushed by masked raiders and pushed to the brink. As the truth unfolds, he discovers the mastermind is his former police academy friend. Betrayal cuts deep as he faces a brutal choice between duty and loyalty in a relentless fight for justice.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Martial arts master Liang Kun withdraws from the jianghu to protect the woman he loves, but his absence leads to her tragic death. Realising he can no longer escape his fate, he returns to the martial world. With the help of beggar clan leader Su Can, Liang Kun fights his way through ruthless enemies to avenge her.

programme.title: Behind the Yellow Line
programme.desc: A fresh graduate, Paul, strikes up an acquaintance with a pretty young girl, Monica, on the metro. Monica is involved in a love affair with a married man while Paul is also pursued by a rich girl. When Paul vows his true love for Monica, she suggests playing hide-and-seek with him in the metro to decide if they are fated to be together.

programme.title: Duel Of Fist
programme.desc: Fan Ke discovers at his father’s deathbed that he has a half-brother, Wenlie, in Thailand. He goes to find Wenlie, who became a boxer to support his sick mother. Following their encounter, the two got involved in the underworld of boxing match gambling.

programme.title: Kungfu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Hong Kong action cinema is famous for its real kung fu moves performed by a group called “Kung Fu Stuntmen”. This docu-film pays tribute to the generations of kung fu stuntmen, with the crew spending over two years digging archives and interviewing many talents, including the most prominent masters like Jackie Chan, Donnie Yen and Sammo Hung.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Skilled shadow Tai Chi boxer Ku Ting hides his skills by working as a construction worker. However, when the thugs assaulted his girlfriend, Ku Ting has no choice but to use his kung fu to show his enemies what it takes to keep justice in line.

programme.title: Raging Fire
programme.desc: As the police sets to arrest a drug lord, a team of masked thugs steals the drugs and murders the cops. Inspector Bong is devastated to see the aftermath of the carnage and soon discovers that the killers are led by Ngo, a former fellow cop who was forced into a life of crime by him. As the two men meet again, it is time to settle the score…

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: A heroic tale about Hong Kong's brave firefighters. These courageous men can march into disastrous firegrounds and risk their lives to save others. However, do they have the same courage to confront their personal issues?

programme.title: The Invincible Fist
programme.desc: A dedicated chief constable nicknamed “The Invincible Fist” is chasing after a band of bandits near a village one day and encounters an innocent blind girl. He quickly falls in love with her, but finds out she is the daughter of a vicious bandit. Will he kill the father of his lover?

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: Brothers Five
programme.desc: The five Kao brothers, separated since birth, are unaware that the master of Teng Lung Manor has killed their father. All five however, vow to defeat the vicious gangsters at the manor due to their bullying ways. After reuniting and with much discipline and hard work, the Kaos are prepared to face Lung and his gang.

programme.title: Lion VS Lion
programme.desc: The traditional lion dance has never looked so good as in Lion VS Lion which captures the most impressive sequences of lion dancing on film. Besides being loaded with enjoyable martial arts chicanery, film historians can revel because it's also the first film that clearly demonstrates the intricacies and differences between the traditional Northern and Southern lion dancing techniques. The Five Venom alumnus and Chang Cheh discovery, Lo Meng, teams up with Liu Chia-liang protege Wang Yu, as they inadvertently turn from vagabond kung-fu school operators into anti-Ching, patriotic fighters.

programme.title: Song of the Assassins
programme.desc: A young assassin is assigned his first mission while secretly investigating the cause of his family’s massacre years ago. During the mission, he finds himself entangled in a political conspiracy that has been planned for years and must use his skills as an assassin to face whatever comes his way.

programme.title: Return of the Sentimental Swordsman
programme.desc: One of Shaw Studio’s highest grossing movies ever, this is the story of Li Chin Huan, the renowned, charming and sentimental swordsman who must fight many opponents, including an evil Clan Chief, for a place in the martial arts world.

programme.title: My Date With A Vampire
programme.desc: Demon slayer Ma Siu Ling crosses paths with a mysterious detective while probing bizarre supernatural cases. From initial distrust to allies, they join forces against an ancient threat looming over the city. As the blood moon rises, they must uncover secrets of their past lives to prevent a modern-day apocalypse.

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Young Bao Tong witnesses the brutal murder of his kung fu master by a vicious villain. A large eagle tattoo on Bao’s chest was spotted by the killer as he escapes. Can Bao escape from the killer?

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.title: The Shadow Whip
programme.desc: Three hundred thousand worth of silver is robbed by a thief using a whip as the weapon. As it is a signature weapon used by a martial arts master “Shadow Whip”, he is suspected and hunted. No one sees him after that. Fifteen years later, a young girl Yang shows up using the same weapon. Who is this girl and what has happened to “Shadow Whip”?

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: Martial arts master Yu has retired for years but is invited to join force with another master Tao to fight against the four famous thieves and retrieve the stolen Dragon Jade. However, Tao’s real plan is to possess the treasure himself and kills Yu after he defeats the thieves...

programme.title: Last Suspect
programme.desc: Lawyer Chen receives a mysterious call demanding her to defend a murder suspect after her daughter is kidnapped, and is told that she can only save her daughter by winning the case. As she starts investigation with the police and evidence emerges, Chen discovers the truth and reveals the mastermind. Can she rescue her daughter in time?

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: Sima works for a corrupt lord Qin who is suffering from a deadly disease that only a special herb can cure. Qin sends him on an urgent mission to retrieve it, but the task is made more difficult when Sima has to fight off other martial artists who want to steal the cure away from him. He has to fight with his ultimate weapon, the Dragon Missile!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Documentary 360
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN's flagship documentary series offers must-see episodes on politics, the economy, social trends, science and the environment in Japan and beyond.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK World TV Special Program
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: On the islands and coast of the Yamaguchi end of the Seto Inland Sea, we experience a warm welcome in these hard-working small communities, poor in amenities but rich in happiness and human kindness.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Parody. In an era of overwhelming, and often fake, information, parody dissects its subject through humor, and breathes new value into the familiar. Explore design through parody.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends

programme.desc: A program for upper primary to lower secondary school children to explore the everyday technologies all around them. Each episode takes a piece of familiar tech to find out what it does and how.

programme.desc: Over 70% of Japanese people are said to use eyeglasses. We visit Sabae, in Fukui, where over 90% of Japan's glasses are made, and explore the history of Japanese eyewear and the latest technology.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: A cat takes a nap among the fragrant flowers at a farm that grows sweet pea flowers. Another cat takes a nap at an archery range! We meet more local cats as residents celebrate a unique tradition.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 15
programme.desc: Dr. Hack is back with tips for treating medical maladies. Plus, Broke Ass Bob hacks moving in together, Kevin tests a homemade tanning blend, and Brooke reveals the Lazy Cook's latest endeavor: homemade microwaved potato chips.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 16
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin test hacks for getting free parking, and Kevin finds the best hack for peeling eggs. Plus, Brooke combats shrinking sweaters, and Pitch Man shares the best hacks for cooking like a pro.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 17
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin test the best hacks for beating a motion detector. Plus, secrets for hacking French manicures and beach hair, keeping your dog off the lawn, and making a frittata out of leftover pizza are revealed.

programme.title: Friends S7 2
programme.desc: Joey finds out that Rachel is reading a steamy romance novel. Monica discovers that her parents have spent the money for her wedding on a beach house.

programme.title: Friends S7 3
programme.desc: Monica becomes obsessed with acquiring Phoebe's secret, delicious cookie recipe. Joey accepts Rachel's help with sailing. Chandler fails to impress Monica's father.

programme.title: Friends S7 4
programme.desc: Rachel wants to hire a cute, young male assistant over a more qualified woman. Joey's show gets cancelled. Chandler, Monica and Ross tell embarrassing secrets about one another.

programme.title: Friends S7 5
programme.desc: Joey tries to teach Chandler how to smile for an engagement picture with Monica. Phoebe and Ross each date the members of a couple preparing for divorce. Joey takes Tag out for a good time.

programme.title: Friends S7 6
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid of honor--but Monica doesn't want to make the decision. Phoebe eventually allows Rachel to fulfill the duty. Chandler tries to apologize to a girlfriend from his youth.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 23
programme.desc: A horrible day at work prompts Penny to evaluate her life choices - including her relationship with Leonard. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle to care for Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 24
programme.desc: With his entire world changing around him, Sheldon is forced to confront an uncertain future and considers a major move in the seventh season finale.

programme.title: Dial M For Murder
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Grace Kelly and Ray Milland star with Robert Cummings in one of Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers--Dial M for Murder. When playboy tennis pro Tony Wendice (Milland--The Lost Weekend) discovers his rich wife, Margot (Kelly--Rear Window, To Catch a Thief), is having an affair with handsome American Mark Hallidy (Cummings--The Carpetbaggers), he devises an ingenious plot to murder her. But when his scheme takes an unexpected, deadly twist, Tony improvises--implicating Margot for first degree murder in this classic spellbinder.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Henry Fonda stars in director Alfred Hitchcock's real-life thriller of an innocent man trapped as the victim of a heartless criminal justice system--even though he's The Wrong Man. When an eyewitness to a robbery identifies musician Christopher Balestrero (Fonda) as the culprit, Balestrero cannot prove where he was on the day of the crime. Now, the wheels of justice--driven by the testimony of witnesses--mercilessly grind away the life of a man who looks remarkably like the real thief. Based on the novel The True Story of Christopher Emmanuel Balestrero by Maxwell Anderson.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 1
programme.desc: On the eighth season premiere, Leonard and Amy take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny interviews for a job at Bernadette's company.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 2
programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to teach a class, Howard surprises everyone by taking it. Meanwhile, the tension between Penny and Bernadette gives Amy a chance to play both sides.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 3
programme.desc: Howard's nervous when NASA asks him to throw out the first pitch at a game. Also, Leonard & Penny try to prove Sheldon wrong after he claims that he & Amy are a superior couple.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: In a universe as vast as it is mysterious, a small but powerful force has existed for centuries. Protectors of peace and justice, they are called the Green Lantern Corps.

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: On his first day on the job as a narcotics officer, a rookie cop goes on a 24-hour training course with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears.

programme.title: The New World
programme.desc: The story of the English exploration of Virginia, and of the changing world and loves of Pocahontas.

programme.title: Joker (2019)
programme.desc: Joker centers around an origin of the iconic arch nemesis and is an original, standalone story not seen before on the big screen. Todd Phillips' exploration of Arthur Fleck (Joaquin Phoenix), a man disregarded by society is not only a gritty character study, but also a broader cautionary tale.

programme.title: Titans S1 1
programme.desc: Rachel Roth, a teen haunted by dark visions and powers, falls under the wing of Det. Dick Grayson.

programme.title: Titans S1 2
programme.desc: In search of a safe haven for Rachel, Dick arrives on the doorstep of vigilante heroes Hawk and Dove.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 07
programme.desc: Michael and his fellow employees debate the authenticity of a giant lizard and find a game with a very specific target audience. Then at the diner, he adds some spice to lunch time and gives patrons the chills while demonstrating a new way to cool soup. Finally at the furniture store, Michael shows his coworker that impossible things can happen in the blink of an eye.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 08
programme.desc: In this special crossover event, the Impractical Jokers help Michael stun coffee bar customers - but soon discover the joke is on them! Plus, Michael's woodland creatures display fantastic hidden abilities.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 09
programme.desc: Michael is back in Chicago to hash out new ideas in a hemp store, but it's not until he inspects a spooky church that people start getting stoned, literally. Plus, Michael teams up with special guest star, Jack Black!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 10
programme.desc: Michael shows some unsuspecting shoppers how to manipulate solid objects, and he reveals the truth behind how automatic vacuums work. Plus, one employee's shift at a camping store becomes very colorful - and confusing.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 11
programme.desc: At Michael's fireworks stand, he's got everything from exploding fruit to levitation sparklers. And at a Hemp store, Michael shows off his innovations in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule completely blows one man's mind!

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 4
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to score a locker packed with rare movie memorabilia. Then, Papa Bear and T-Money each scoop up low-grade bins, but when they each start to sift through their individual messes, one of them finds a childhood dream-come-true. Andlater, the day's final auction sparks an intense bidding war, but when one of our buyers shoots the moon on his bid, it leaves everyone else wondering exactly where all of this cash is coming from.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 5
programme.desc: Our buyers lock horns to win a unit packed with valuable construction equipment. Then, Brandon and Lori spot something that no one else does, but they'll have to play it cool if they want to walk away with this golden score. And later, the day's final locker smells of gas and cash, but leads to a showdown that gets one of our buyers banned from the auction.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 7
programme.desc: Brandon and Jesse lock horns in a do or die bidding war. One of them spies an authentic treasure hidden amongst the contents, but only one will walk away with the score. And later, a newbie steals a prize unit out from under our regulars and proves that she's here to play. Then, Brandon and Lori unearth a five-alarm find. If it works, they could be looking at a $20,000 pay day on this item alone.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 8
programme.desc: Our buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits? Then, a dumpy unit sends almost everyone running, but Papa Bear spies a profit. And later, the day's final auction contains expensive looking sky-diving equipment that ignites a sky-high bidding war. But when the dust settles, the winner will unveil a hidden gem that spells a five-figure payday.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 04
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of Hide-and-Sneak, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 05
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q hop behind the register at a burger joint and then head to a department store where they have only themselves to blame. And tonight's big loser gets into a rigged elevator only to find his own worst nightmare.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 1
programme.desc: On the eighth season premiere, Leonard and Amy take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny interviews for a job at Bernadette's company.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 2
programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to teach a class, Howard surprises everyone by taking it. Meanwhile, the tension between Penny and Bernadette gives Amy a chance to play both sides.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 3
programme.desc: Howard's nervous when NASA asks him to throw out the first pitch at a game. Also, Leonard & Penny try to prove Sheldon wrong after he claims that he & Amy are a superior couple.

programme.title: Titans S1 1
programme.desc: Rachel Roth, a teen haunted by dark visions and powers, falls under the wing of Det. Dick Grayson.

programme.title: Titans S1 2
programme.desc: In search of a safe haven for Rachel, Dick arrives on the doorstep of vigilante heroes Hawk and Dove.

programme.title: North By Northwest
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars as an innocent man mistaken for a spy in one of director Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers. While leaving New York's Plaza Hotel, advertising executive Roger Thornhill (Grant) has the misfortune of standing just as the name "George Kaplan" is paged--starting a lethal case of mistaken identity and a nonstop game of cat and mouse as he is pursued across North America by espionage agents trying to kill him--and by police who suspect him of murder.

programme.title: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Firefighter Gordon Brewer, is done putting out fires and ready to start one of his own. When his wife and child are horrifically killed in an international terrorist bombing -- linked to Claudio "The Wolf" Perrini -- the CIA and FBI offer no answers and no response. With the official investigation going nowhere, and haunted by the thought of his family's killer walking away scot-free, Gordon swears revenge, even if it takes him to Colombia.

programme.title: Friends S7 2
programme.desc: Joey finds out that Rachel is reading a steamy romance novel. Monica discovers that her parents have spent the money for her wedding on a beach house.

programme.title: Friends S7 3
programme.desc: Monica becomes obsessed with acquiring Phoebe's secret, delicious cookie recipe. Joey accepts Rachel's help with sailing. Chandler fails to impress Monica's father.

programme.title: King Arthur: Legend of the Sword
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Guy Ritchie brings his dynamic style to the epic fantasy action adventure "King Arthur: Legend of the Sword." Starring Charlie Hunnam in the title role, the film is an iconoclastic take on the classic Excalibur myth, tracing Arthur's journey from the streets to the throne. When the child Arthur's father is murdered, Vortigern (Jude Law), Arthur's uncle, seizes the crown. Robbed of his birthright and with no idea who he truly is, Arthur comes up the hard way in the back alleys of the city. But once he pulls the sword from the stone, his life is turned upside down and he is forced to acknowledge his true legacy...whether he likes it or not.

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: A new live-action adventure from director David Yates (Harry Potter films) brings Edgar Rice Burroughs' legendary character back to the big screen. It's been years since the man once known as Tarzan (Alexander Skarsgard --True Blood) left the jungles of Africa behind for a gentrified life as John Clayton III, Lord Greystoke, with his beloved wife, Jane (Margot Robbie --The Wolf of Wall Street) at his side. Now, he has been invited back to the Congo to serve as a trade emissary of Parliament, unaware that he is a pawn in a deadly convergence of greed and revenge, masterminded by the Belgian, Captain Leon Rom (Oscar® winner Christoph Waltz). But those behind the murderous plot have no idea what they are about to unleash.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Ben Affleck writes, directs and stars in this crime drama/romance. Based on the novel The Prince of Thieves by Chuck Hogan, Affleck's film follows a career criminal (Affleck) who finds himself romantically involved with the manager of a bank (Rebecca Hall) he held up. A high-stakes love triangle develops when an equally infatuated FBI agent (Mad Men's Jon Hamm) arrives in the pursuit of justice. Stolen cash and a stolen heart lead to a relationship that could destroy this prince of thieves.

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this psychological thriller following two cops, one haunted by echoes of his past, investigating a series of murders.

programme.title: Friends S7 4
programme.desc: Rachel wants to hire a cute, young male assistant over a more qualified woman. Joey's show gets cancelled. Chandler, Monica and Ross tell embarrassing secrets about one another.

programme.title: Friends S7 5
programme.desc: Joey tries to teach Chandler how to smile for an engagement picture with Monica. Phoebe and Ross each date the members of a couple preparing for divorce. Joey takes Tag out for a good time.

programme.title: Friends S7 6
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe compete to be Monica's maid of honor--but Monica doesn't want to make the decision. Phoebe eventually allows Rachel to fulfill the duty. Chandler tries to apologize to a girlfriend from his youth.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 23
programme.desc: A horrible day at work prompts Penny to evaluate her life choices - including her relationship with Leonard. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette struggle to care for Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 24
programme.desc: With his entire world changing around him, Sheldon is forced to confront an uncertain future and considers a major move in the seventh season finale.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 06
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo, and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 07
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Smallville S2 3
programme.desc: After one of his friends discovers Clark's spaceship in the cornfield, Clark defies his parents' wishes and reveals his secret to the person--who gives him a shocking reaction.

programme.title: Smallville S2 4
programme.desc: When the school unwittingly uses red meteor rocks in its class rings, Clark experiences a new meteorite effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 16
programme.desc: At a cell phone store, Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix your tablet, and later, he makes a drink that's impossible to swallow. Plus, a dog owner loves that Michael has turned her pet into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 17
programme.desc: Michael turns leftovers into beauty products at a soap shop, and at a record store, he shows a hip-hop fan how to jump around. Plus, at a children's store, Michael's co-worker learns about the dangers of babysitting.

programme.desc: Police takedowns can be risky business when criminals are armed and dangerous. That's why officers rely on non-lethal tactics like tasers, bean bag rounds and K-9 units to subdue suspects.

programme.desc: Watch semi-trucks wreak havoc on roadways, criminals flee cops in pursuit, and crashes, collisions and cars flying through the air -- a dashboard camera can capture it all.

programme.desc: Clark becomes concerned when a mysterious poet, Byron Moore (SEAN FARIS), leaves love notes for Lana at her parents' grave. Clark warns her to stay away from Byron, but she is intrigued.

programme.desc: Gather 'round for a most hackful holiday celebration, as Brooke and Kevin demonstrate how to navigate any holiday office party like a pro Elf, and explain how the ball drop became a New Year's tradition.

programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke hack their way through the worst obstacles an airport has to offer, and viewers share their DIY solutions for whipping up cream. Plus, Brooke and Kevin find out how low prices can go if you're a "good guy."

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 9
programme.desc: Our buyers go head-to-head to score an item that appears to be a covered car. But when the tarp is pulled back, will the winner drive away with a pile of cash or a piece of trash? Then, the legality of a locker's contents is called into question, but Brandon and Lori take a leap of faith and are rattled by what they find. And later, Sean has saved the best for last as our buyers are given the rare opportunity to compete for unclaimed airline luggage. It's an auction of a different breed that ignites a cash spending frenzy.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews

programme.title: East of Eden
programme.desc: Hollywood legend James Dean stars in this adaptation of John Steinbeck's classic novel East of Eden. Teenaged Cal Trask (Dean--Rebel Without a Cause, Giant) longs for the affection that his father reserves for his brother Aron, but his efforts meet only rejection. Also attracted to Aron's girlfriend, Cal becomes so frustrated in his search for love and acceptance that he reveals a long-held secret about their mother to Aron . . . knowledge that now tears the family apart.

programme.title: In Conversation with Sachin Tendulkar

programme.title: Jim Maxwell's Ashes Memories
programme.desc: The voice of summer, ABC cricket commentator Jim Maxwell reflects on his six favourite Ashes moments, starting with the incident between Jonny Bairstow and Alex Carey at Lord's in 2023 when Bairstow was stumped.

programme.title: Jim Maxwell's Ashes Memories
programme.desc: Jim Maxwell and Corbin Middlemas look back at some of the moments that have defined the Ashes rivalry. Part two follows Jim to Lord's in 1972 where he watched from the stands as Bob Massie put on a bowling clinic.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Judgment: Cases That Changed Australia
programme.desc: Terra Nullius: law or lie? Eddie Mabo and others challenge the legal fiction at the heart of colonisation and transform Australia's understanding of land and sovereignty.

programme.title: The World This Week
programme.desc: Manny Tsigas brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: First Generation
programme.desc: First Generation follows nine inspiring people from the Asia-Pacific who built new lives and forged their own path. Their stories celebrate ambition, belonging, and the diverse spirit that defines modern Australia.

programme.title: Great Australian Road Trips

programme.title: Japan Hour
programme.desc: Kumamoto Prefecture is the stage for cycling this time. The area, in the center of the island of Kyushu, is recovering from an earthquake in 2016. The program starts in the city of Kumamoto and works its way around the Amakusa island chain. It then heads for Mount Aso, where one of the world’s largest volcanic craters is located. Meet the people and see the sights of this 4-day, 300km bicycle journey.

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: The Possession of Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A female police officer relocates to a quiet small town and is drawn into a chilling case involving a girl seemingly possessed by an evil spirit. As her investigation deepens, unsettling truths emerge. She soon realises this is not just an exorcism, but a psychological battle that uncovers the town’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Whisper of Silent Body
programme.desc: Renowned as the "corpse whisperer," forensic pathologist Qin Ming uncovers vital clues from the corpses. During a homicide investigation, he unravels a murder case sixteen years ago in the snowy mountain with his assistant and a detective. Together, they unveil the secrets of the mysterious homicide.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Tear Us Apart
programme.desc: After their young daughter’s mysterious disappearance, Drew and Helen retreat to a secluded woodland cottage for therapy. As they struggle to salvage their marriage, isolation fractures their sanity. Haunted by visions and strange events, Helen can no longer tell what is real as her mind unravels.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building — only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes a job as a night guard. When the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at an abandoned building — only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Bob spent a fabulous career as a successful artist painting and drawing for department store advertising, where his work caught the attention of many celebrities.

programme.title: The Cult Of The Black Jesus
programme.desc: Steven Tari, Papua New Guinea's most notorious cult leader, was charged with multiple accounts of underage rape and murder through his systemic use of 'flower girls' or cannibalistic virgin sacrifices.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: A home invasion results in a man being beaten to death and set on fire. As investigators race to find the perpetrator, a shocking 911 call pits two brothers against each other in the interrogation room.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: In an affluent Washington town, a teenage heartbreak spirals into obsession, culminating in a deadly house-party shooting that exposes how jealousy can turn lethal.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: 9-year-old Kamryn Johnson is supposed to be at gymnastics class when her mother, Sheraton, receives a frantic phone call saying Kamryn is being held captive for ransom.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man shows up unexpectedly on a homeowner’s doorstep; a jeweller locks a woman in a vault to wait for police to arrive.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man dressed as a chicken claims to be tripping on mushrooms; a woman attempts to use a police car as her taxi to the bar.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Bob spent a fabulous career as a successful artist painting and drawing for department store advertising, where his work caught the attention of many celebrities.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Holiday spirit all but disappears from Marietta, Georgia, when one of its most festive residents is found murdered in his own home.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Linda grew up in luxury, her parents' Miami mansion meticulously maintained by staff. As a young woman, she worked in high-end real estate and enjoyed the Miami social scene.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: After suffering traumatic losses, Linda's life took a drastic turn. Now, at 70, her once-elegant lifestyle has evolved into an existence surrounded by trash and decay.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9)
programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers pursue gas thieves, use pepper balls to arrest a barricaded suspect and respond to shots fired in a remote village—showing the risks of policing Alaska’s wild terrain.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop in New Mexico, an officer’s radio falls silent, triggering a frantic manhunt caught entirely on body cam.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Chef Philip Rolph was besotted with waitress Georgina Henshaw. But Phil realised she was using him for his money, and Georgina bragged to a friend that she was planning to kill him.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover agents Lyle Kirian and Brian Townsend embed themselves in two different but equally dangerous worlds in order to investigate suspected local gang members and the Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S3)
programme.desc: An argument between former NFL player Travis Rudolph and his ex-girlfriend escalates into a gunfight with her brother and his friends.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles—wives who stray from their husbands with disastrous results, a deadly case of online catfishing, and a lonely young woman who has an affair with a killer.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Spring Valley's Haitian community is rocked when a civic leader is murdered. It takes police nearly two decades to sift through the rumours and solve a mystery filled with lies and dark secrets.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: When the Singapore Police need help, they turn to Lim Chin Chin, the Director of Forensic Chemistry and Physics Laboratory.

programme.title: Partners In Crime (S1)
programme.desc: Watch how cyber-sleuths like Erik Laykin crack cyber crimes as well as hiring hackers to tap into the cyber underworld.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: The action picks up both on the water and off as one of the summer's biggest events descends upon the Lake of the Ozarks: The Shootout powerboat races.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: Behind the murder of a devoted husband lies a dangerous secret—an illicit relationship that transforms jealousy into a deadly plot within one family.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Undercover ATF and DEA agents are reminded to never judge a book by its cover and to always be on their toes. Even small-time suspects have the potential to unleash terror.

programme.desc: When 8-year-old Engeline mysteriously disappears, police, the public and a clairvoyant uncover dark secrets as they search for her.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A 73-year-old murder suspect trashes the interrogation room; a married mother of three admits to a 26-year-old cold case killing; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: Investigators interrogate a prison inmate about an unsolved serial killer case from the 90s; a former police sergeant is questioned about the murder of his mistress; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When the blood-smeared car of 27-year-old Stefanie Watson is found in a Maryland parking lot, her family holds out hope she's still alive.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: In 2019, Jim's daughter, Elesha, lost her job and needed a place to stay so she moved. Moving in with Jim however, dealing with the hoard has been the most difficult part of her life.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the standoff with the suspect.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn. The investigation into her death takes her family on a harrowing journey.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'Est Mathematique ! Avec Iman
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Mission Heros
programme.desc: At 8 years old, Amir leads the life of an everyday superhero. Thanks to his online avatar, he raises awareness among the children who watch him and throughout his neighborhood about civility and citizenship.

programme.title: Belfort & Lupin
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Liam
programme.desc: The city of Belmont is preparing to host the universal science fair. Liam, an android with the appearance of a teenager, is getting ready to flee the laboratory where he was created: because he is starting to feel emotions, his creator wants to reset him.

programme.title: Foot Go
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel
programme.desc: Simiouni discovers that Professor Noukira trapped him by forcing him to denounce himself. Touria devotes herself entirely to her studies and spends her time revising her lessons.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Matiere Grise
programme.desc: The magazine programme which takes the mystery out of science, encouraging us to think... without all the brain work!

programme.title: Sans Detours
programme.desc: Meeting Lauriane Gillieron and her adoptive sister Florence. They don't share the same surname yet grew up together. Coming from Angola and left to fend for herself, Florence naturally found her place in the Gillieron family, which already had three children. They start a dialogue to share essential truths...

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Stoemp, Peket... Et Des Rawettes
programme.desc: A veritable celebration of Belgium's regions, along with the locals who live there, their regional languages... and their humour!

programme.title: Ding Dong : Les Speciaux
programme.desc: In Berlin, Viola and Jan explore an urban monastery founded by Swiss people and home to several families. Then on to Hamburg, where the German adventure ends in... a theatre and with a nomadic couple who travel across Europe in a bus.

programme.title: Au Bonheur Des Livres
programme.desc: Around a chosen theme, Claire Chazal welcomes two authors: novelists, biographers, essayists or historians, and shares viewers' literary favorites.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Hasni Bekheira grew up in Grenoble, in the Teisseire neighborhood, where he learned hairdressing at a very young age. Without a diploma but driven by passion, he created Street Coiff. The principle: a chair, clippers and free haircuts for homeless people or detainees. Today recognized, he is proud of this tool of dignity and dialogue.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: Double world champion in the 100 meters and 200 meters freestyle in 2022 and 2025, European champion in the same distances, Olympic champion in Paris in the 200 meters and bronze medalist in the 100 meters: Pierre Classen welcomes Romanian swimmer David Popovici.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Rosa Kanno, eco-responsible stylist, creates made-to-measure clothing. Rejecting fast fashion, Rosa designs dresses using 3D modeling, which allows her to adjust creations to the clients' body shapes and limit fabric waste. A Franco-Belgian accessories designer, Sarah Levy creates hybrid pieces designed to free the body and adapt to contemporary movement. Committed to local and sustainable production, she works with Brussels workshops to refine her prototypes in leather and recycled nylon.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles
programme.desc: Vreni gives a soul to objects. To those she builds, repairs or adopts. Her house, like her life, is filled with them.

programme.title: Guides D'Aventures

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'Est Mathematique ! Avec Iman
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans ca
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Mission Heros
programme.desc: At 8 years old, Amir leads the life of an everyday superhero. Thanks to his online avatar, he raises awareness among the children who watch him and throughout his neighborhood about civility and citizenship.

programme.title: Belfort & Lupin
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Liam
programme.desc: Dr. Wood is on Liam's trail. The android must find a way not to be tracked. Rafaele, who helped him escape, wonders if she has made a mistake.

programme.title: Foot Go
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel
programme.desc: Touria is a brilliant and diligent student, which soon arouses the jealousy of the other students.

programme.title: Tandem
programme.desc: The body of a stripper, dressed as a fire fighter, is found during a party. But who could have had it in for the fire-fighting hero? The consequences of fire brigade intervention that ended badly, or the settling of a personal score?

programme.title: Tandem
programme.desc: When a man is adamant about have escaped a murder attempt and accuses his partner's ex-husband, the police pay little attention. After all the former couple are in a no-holds barred battle over custody of their son. But tragedy strikes when the man's body is found, murdered that same evening.

programme.title: Jumping International De La Baule - Rolex Grand Prix 2026
programme.desc: For over sixty years, the Jumping International de La Baule has attracted the world's show jumping elite. This 64th event was held from 5 to 8 June 2025. We look back at the highlights of the Rolex Grand Prix - Ville de La Baule, one of the competition's headline events.

programme.title: A L'ecole Des Vetos
programme.desc: Laurine examines sheep while Alexandre helps Elvis with his cataract operation. Meanwhile, Stephanie looks after a deer found on the side of the road and introduces Jolie Nana, the school's feathered mascot!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: A key figure from the world of sport looks back at a particular competition, a career, an outstanding moment.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Tiny Houses, Reve Ou Effet De Mode ?
programme.desc: During a hike, Regine Lorenz realizes that she does not need much to be happy. Christian Gerber decides to build his own ''Tiny House'' in a former circus trailer. Claudia Raemy has been dreaming of a simpler life since she separated from the father of her children.

programme.title: 100 % Logique - La Reponse Est Sous Vos Yeux
programme.desc: The quiz that, rather than testing general knowledge and culture, tests the participants' powers of logic, observation and common sense. One hundred candidates compete for a jackpot that could climb to 100,000 euros. Who will manage to overcome all the obstacles and reach the final question?

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion

programme.desc: Marie-Pierre Mouligneau, Livia Dushkoff, and Guy Lemaire form the yellow team. Facing them, the purple team composed of Lucile Poulain, Heloise Blanchaert, and Walid.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2

With Nikola Karabatic, Matthias Dandois, Claude Dartois, Heloise Martin, Catherine Davydzenka, Major Mouvement.

programme.title: La Boite A Secrets
programme.desc: We all have secrets that we keep buried deep inside us, kept in a box to which we alone have the key. They are so powerful, surprising or moving that we want to share them. What if we opened up the Pandora's box of three artists?

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy
programme.desc: Forests protect us from global warming by absorbing the CO2 we emit. But this precious resource is in danger, weakened in particular by heat and droughts. An investigation into the men and women who fight, sometimes at the risk of their lives, to save the forests.

programme.title: Le Monde De Jamy
programme.desc: Habitat, transport, lighting... At a time when we face global warming and the need to save energy, animals often have the solution! They have learned to adapt to the most extreme environments and deploy incredible ingenuity to survive.

programme.title: Demo De Mode
programme.desc: With a predilection for bringing life back to dormant fashion houses, and an unfailing love of elegance: Guillaume Henry presents his autumn-winter 2024/2025 collection for Patou.

programme.title: Pompon Ours

programme.title: Conte-Nous !
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo

programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!
